/usr/bin/ar qc libkernel.a CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/vfs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/file_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/wait_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/plugin_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/module_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/service_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/poll_watcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/device/serial_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/device/memory_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/device/gpgpu_device.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libkernel.a
